LIGHT_BG  = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF7, 0xFA)   # Light gray background
WHITE     = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)

# ── Helper Functions ───────────────────────────────────────────────

    """Set slide background fill to a solid color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color
